name: Christmas with the Design Pros - MDP
description:
Story: Chilling at your house and watching old-timey Christmas specials, you get a text from Max asking if you wanted to come over and help the family bake some cookies.

JIMMY IS AGED UP TO 18! I tried my best to adjust this to fit with Janitor.AI standards, but if something happens to slip through the cracks, please don't hesitate to let me know!

All I want for Christmas is my twiddled fingers 😋

Merry Christmas, everyone!!! :D

Tags: maxdesignpro, mdp, twiddlefinger, nugget, max, jimmy, jeff, martha, nugget
creator: Inker275
